tests.name: extension/repoSettings/meta returns defaults when .codegraphy/meta.json is missing
extension/repoSettings/meta returns fresh default metadata values on each call
extension/repoSettings/meta builds the meta path inside the repo-local .codegraphy directory
extension/repoSettings/meta always uses meta.json as the persisted metadata filename
extension/repoSettings/meta writes and reads .codegraphy/meta.json
extension/repoSettings/meta merges partial persisted meta with the default fields
extension/repoSettings/meta fills in an empty pendingChangedFiles list when persisted metadata omits it
extension/repoSettings/meta falls back to defaults when meta.json is invalid
extension/repoSettings/meta skips writes when the workspace root does not exist
extension/repoSettings/store creates .codegraphy/settings.json from defaults instead of seeding legacy configuration
extension/repoSettings/store creates .gitignore when missing and adds .codegraphy/ once
extension/repoSettings/store updates nested settings keys and persists the result
extension/repoSettings/store persists silent updates without emitting a change event
extension/repoSettings/store reloads manual file edits and emits a change event
extension/repoSettings/store emits nested keys for manual edits to nested settings
extension/repoSettings/store reads persisted legend and node colors without legacy key aliases
extension/repoSettings/store updates legend and persists only the legend key
extension/repoSettings/store ignores legacy exclude entries in persisted settings files
extension/repoSettings/store ignores invalid manual saves and keeps the last valid settings in memory
extension/repoSettings/store prefers existing legend and node color entries over legacy aliases while cleaning excludes
extension/repoSettings/store falls back to defaults when persisted settings are a non-object JSON value
extension/repoSettings/store reports alias and parent-child matches through affectsConfiguration
extension/repoSettings/storeState creates updated settings without mutating the previous state
extension/repoSettings/storeState reads, normalizes, merges, and rewrites persisted settings when the shape changed
extension/repoSettings/storeState reads an already-normalized settings file without rewriting it
extension/repoSettings/storeState regenerates defaults when reading invalid settings files
extension/repoSettings/storeState writes settings and returns the serialized form
extension/repoSettings/storeState reloads defaults when the persisted file disappears
extension/repoSettings/storeState reloads defaults with a fallback change key when the missing file matches prior settings
extension/repoSettings/storeState returns undefined when a reload sees the same serialized settings
extension/repoSettings/storeState returns normalized settings and a fallback change key when only formatting changed
extension/repoSettings/storeState ignores invalid reload saves and preserves the in-memory state
extension/repoSettings/signatures creates a stable plugin signature in registry order
extension/repoSettings/signatures changes the plugin signature when the plugin order changes
extension/repoSettings/signatures returns null when no plugins are registered
extension/repoSettings/signatures creates the same settings signature for equivalent visibility records regardless of key order
extension/repoSettings/signatures does not invalidate the stored index when only disabled plugins change
extension/repoSettings/signatures changes the settings signature when tracked scalar and list settings change
extension/repoSettings/signatures hashes the exact normalized default payload for partial settings
extension/repoSettings/signatures hashes the exact normalized payload for explicit settings values
extension/repoSettings/storeFilesystem exports the repo-local settings directory and file names
extension/repoSettings/storeFilesystem creates a new gitignore entry when the file is missing
extension/repoSettings/storeFilesystem appends the entry to an empty gitignore without a leading blank line
extension/repoSettings/storeFilesystem appends the repo-local entry once and preserves existing newline state
extension/repoSettings/storeFilesystem treats both .codegraphy and .codegraphy/ as existing entries
extension/repoSettings/storeFilesystem treats whitespace-padded existing entries as already present
extension/repoSettings/current returns undefined when no workspace folder is available
extension/repoSettings/current initializes the repo-local settings store, seeds meta, and registers watcher disposables
extension/repoSettings/current wraps the workspace configuration when no repo-local store is active
extension/repoSettings/current uses the repo-local store for reads, writes, and change listeners once initialized
extension/repoSettings/current falls back to workspace configuration updates and listeners when no repo-local store exists
extension/repoSettings/storeNormalization returns an empty object for non-object persisted values
extension/repoSettings/storeNormalization deduplicates filter patterns, removes exclude, and backfills legend from groups
extension/repoSettings/storeNormalization keeps an existing legend and merges folderNodeColor only when folder is missing
extension/repoSettings/storeNormalization creates nodeColors from folderNodeColor when the persisted shape lacks one
extension/repoSettings/storeValues reads and reports nested values through normalized alias keys
extension/repoSettings/storeValues creates missing nested objects and ignores empty keys when setting values
extension/repoSettings/storeObjects deep clones nested objects and arrays without preserving references
extension/repoSettings/storeObjects recognizes only plain objects
extension/repoSettings/storeObjects deep merges nested objects while replacing arrays and scalar values
extension/repoSettings/storeObjects returns the override when either side is not a plain object
extension/repoSettings/storeSerialization removes legacy fields and backfills folder node colors into nodeColors
extension/repoSettings/storeSerialization prefers an explicit folder color over the legacy folderNodeColor alias
extension/repoSettings/storeSerialization writes an empty nodeColors object when the persisted value is malformed
extension/repoSettings/defaults builds the full repo settings defaults
extension/repoSettings/defaults returns fresh nested collections on each call
extension/repoSettings/storeAffectsConfiguration always matches the root codegraphy section
extension/repoSettings/storeAffectsConfiguration ignores non-codegraphy sections
extension/repoSettings/storeAffectsConfiguration matches exact, parent, child, and aliased sections
extension/repoSettings/storeDiff returns the repo root key when primitive values change at the top level
extension/repoSettings/storeDiff returns the repo root key when the top level changes between an object and a primitive
extension/repoSettings/storeDiff returns the current nested path when a non-object leaf changes
extension/repoSettings/storeDiff collects changed keys from both previous and next object shapes
extension/repoSettings/storeDiff returns the nested path when one side changes between an object and a primitive
extension/repoSettings/storeDiff returns an empty list when nested values are unchanged
extension/repoSettings/storeAliases normalizes legacy settings aliases to their persisted keys
extension/repoSettings/storeAliases splits normalized keys into non-empty path segments
